subcodes.first_line: O thou who strivest with thy spirit, tongue and pen to spread the divine fragrances! That which thou didst write [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من یجاهد بروحه و لسانه و قلمه فی نشر نفحات الله آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
